title: Histone extraction for mass spectrometry-based analysis of Aspergillus
author: Xin Zhang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.btpinmke
materials: Freeze germinated spores in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Harvest fungal spores from 4- or...
steps.instruction: Harvest fungal spores from 4- or 5 -day old sporulating plates with a spreader in 12.5 mL ice-cold ACES buffer

steps.title: Discard supernatant and resuspend spores in...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and resuspend spores in 25 mL ice-cold ACES buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend spores in 10 mL ice-cold...
steps.instruction: Resuspend spores in 10 mL ice-cold ACES buffer, and count spore concentration with an hemacytometer or spore counter. Ideally, the spore concentration is around 1 × 10 7 spores/ mL.

steps.title: Inoculate 50 mL of liquid medium...
steps.instruction: Inoculate 50 mL of liquid medium with 1 ~ 10 × 10 7 spores in a 250 mL flask, and incubate at 30 ℃, 200 rpm, for 16 hours.

steps.title: Collect germinated spores by centrifugation at...
steps.instruction: Collect germinated spores by centrifugation at 4,000 xg for 10 minutes and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend germinated spore pellet in 25 mL 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend germinated spore pellet in 25 mL 0.8 M NaCl.

steps.title: Grind freeze-dried samples with a mortar...
steps.instruction: Grind freeze-dried samples with a mortar and pestle, and then with TissueLyser II using two ⌀5 mm metal beads at 30 Hz for 30 seconds, which is repeated twice.

steps.title: Resuspend 100 mg ground sample in...
steps.instruction: Resuspend 100 mg ground sample in 1 mL lysis buffer with high Triton X-100 concentration (1×PBS, 0.5 mM PMSF, 5 µM Leupeptin, 5 µM Aprotinin, 5mM Na-butyrate, and 10% Triton X-100).

steps.title: Add 10 ml lysis buffer with...
steps.instruction: Add 10 ml lysis buffer with low Triton X-100 concentration (1×PBS, 0.5 mM PMSF, 5 µM Leupeptin, 5 µM Aprotinin, 5mM Na-butyrate, and 1% Triton X-100), mix by vortexing, and incubate on the orbital shaker at 4 ℃ for another 30 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3,250 xg for 30...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3,250 xg for 30 minutes at 4 ℃, and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Add 9 mL ice-cold PBS buffer and mix by vortexing
steps.instruction: Add 9 mL ice-cold PBS buffer and mix by vortexing.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 2 mL 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 2 mL 0.4 N H 2 SO 4 and incubate at 4 ℃ for 4 hours on an orbital shaker.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,000 xg for 10 minutes at 4 ℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000 xg for 10 minutes at 4 ℃. The supernatant contains soluble core histone proteins.

steps.title: Add 4 volumes of acetone to...
steps.instruction: Add 4 volumes of acetone to the sample, and keep at -20 ℃ overnight to precipitate histone proteins.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6,000 xg for 25...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6,000 xg for 25 minutes at 4 ℃ to pellet proteins, then dissolve in 100 µL water.

steps.title: Measure protein concentration with the Bradford Protein Assay (He, F
steps.instruction: Measure protein concentration with the Bradford Protein Assay (He, F., Bio-protocol, 2011).

steps.title: Sonicate for 30 seconds; this process...
steps.instruction: Sonicate for 30 seconds; this process is repeated 10 times with 30 seconds break in between.

steps.title: Check protein quality via 16% SDS-PAGE...
steps.instruction: Check protein quality via 16% SDS-PAGE (Sodium dodecyl sulfate polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis) gel (Simpson, R. J., Cold Spring Harbor Protocols, 2006).

steps.title: Centrifuge the spore suspension at 2,500...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the spore suspension at 2,500 xg at 4 ℃ for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge the spore suspension at 2,500...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the spore suspension at 2,500 xg at 4 ℃ for 5 minutes, and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Incubate on an orbital shaker for...
steps.instruction: Incubate on an orbital shaker for 30 minutes at 4 ℃.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4,000 xg for 10...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4,000 xg for 10 minutes and discard supernatant to get rid of liquid medium.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3,250 xg for 20...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3,250 xg for 20 minutes at 4 ℃, and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend in 1 mL ice-cold PBS buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 1 mL ice-cold PBS buffer.
